items.title: NEWS: Legendary #Magic play-by-play voice David Steele has retired.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
NEWS: Legendary #Magic play-by-play voice David Steele has retired.

“It’s been an honor to represent the Orlando Magic and I am forever grateful,” Steele said.

Dante Marchitelli will replace Steele as Orlando’s new play-by-play TV voice.

More inside: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/14/o...

media.title: David Steele retires after 37 seasons as play-by-play voice of Magic
media.description: David Steele said he is “forever grateful” to have had the opportunity to serve as the play-by-play voice of the Orlando Magic since 1989.

items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 14, 1996: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team defeats Greece, 128-62, during an exhibition game in Indianapolis.

Reggie Miller had 21 PTS/3 STL for the "Dream Team," which started the game with a 20-3 lead. Karl Malone scored 19 PTS and Grant Hill added 15 PTS.

items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
I launched Locked On Hawks 10 years ago today.

The Hawks had just signed Dwight Howard, people were mad at me for hating it, and my 1st episode focused on 4 players on the Summer League roster.

Taurean Prince
DeAndre Bembry
Edy Tavares
Isaia Cordinier

(been a long time, huh?)
